svg.aria-label: Weekly security digest 2026-04-13: Marimo pre-auth RCE actively exploited, Adobe Acrobat CVE-2026-34621 zero-day patched, CPUID supply-chain breach distributes STX RAT via trojanized CPU-Z
svg.title: 2026-04-13 digest: Marimo RCE (Critical active exploit), Adobe CVE-2026-34621 zero-day (Critical patched), CPUID STX RAT (Medium supply chain)
svg.text: No auth required -- full remote exec
Actively exploited Reader zero-day -- patch deployed
CPUID Breach: STX RAT via CPU-Z
Trojanized CPU-Z distributed STX remote access trojan
24h window: Apr 9 15:00 UTC - Apr 10 10:00 UTC / The Hacker News
